experiments.description: sub-block splitting: detect OCR x-narrowing within columns to split at illustration boundaries
experiments.note: Page 306 E3 FAIL→PASS. Left column split into wide top (y=8-78.5) + narrow bottom (x=38.2, y=78.7-95) avoiding illustration. Page 62 partial: narrow B1 correct but wide B3 starts at y=34.8 (transitional line pulls it up).
failures: P62 E3: B3 wide block starts at y=34.8 due to transitional line L67

experiments.description: skip leading transitional lines (x > medianMinX+10) from wide blocks after narrow regions
experiments.note: Page 62 E3 FAIL→PASS. Wide block B3 now starts at y=36.7 (skips L67 at x=24.8 which was in the illustration transition zone). 15 chars lost from L67 — acceptable tradeoff.
failures: P50 E3: body zone (not column-split), scattered annotations create single block overlapping two illustrations
